headline: Xcel Energy Powering Communities, Economies as Energy Landscape Evolves
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 02, 2026--Xcel Energy (NASDAQ: XEL) is strengthening its energy grid with new electric generation and infrastructure to adapt to a rapidly evolving energy landscape, the company announced today in its 21st annual Sustainability Report.
